dictionary_sections.definition: RESERVED SIGNAL CONTINUITY GAP ID1123 is a source-backed TZPID registry entry anchored by the formal relation H_\text{max} = \log_2(64) = 6\,\text{bits}. The entry records the named mathematical object as it appears in recovered source evidence and prepares it for the locked four-page production layout.
dictionary_sections.contextual_meaning: In context, RESERVED SIGNAL CONTINUITY GAP ID1123 is not treated as an isolated label. It is read through the nearby source passage: inciple that produces golden-ratio branching in plant growth, spiral arrangements in sunflower seeds, and shell geometry: **the golden ratio maximises the information capacity of a constrained geometric structure.** --- ## Part Three: Codon Information Theory (ID 1123) ### The Entropy Ceiling DNA encodes proteins through codons — triplets of nucleotide bases. With four possible bases (A, T, G, C), there are $4^3 = 64$ possible codons. The maximum information content per codon is therefore: $$H_\text{max} = \log_2(64) = 6\,\text{bits}$$ This is the theoretical ceiling. This keeps the dictionary explanation tied to the mathematical usage that produced the recovered formula.
dictionary_sections.derivable_consequences: The canonical relation supplies the primary production equation, while the support chain \vec{A} {induced}(\vec{r},t) = -\frac{1}{4\pi c^{2}}\int {V}\frac{\partial\vec{J}/\partial t}{|\vec{r}-\vec{r}^{\prime}|}d^{3}r^{\prime}; 4^3 = 64; \begin{equation} \vec{J} = \sigma(\vec{r}) \vec{E} \end{equation} records adjacent mathematical consequences or compatible constraints. These relations can be used as equation support on the derivation page after author review.

\end{aligned}

\mathcal{K}_{1123}
:=

\end{aligned}
